messages.content:
Here is the job descriptions:

I'm looking for someone with an accomplished, highly distinctive musical voice to compliment what I do, is capable of adapting their style to accommodate the varying aesthetic requirements of different productions, ideally someone with great sound design abilities. Someone who can record, mix and self produce to world-class / industry standard, always delivers promptly, responsive is a great communicator, and crucially, a lovely person!

I'd love someone UK / Europe based, just as the lag in communications can be tricky with time differences. But if the above really sounds like you and you live further away, I'd still love to hear from you.

I need someone who is well-versed and experienced with scoring for film and tv, with all the diligence and flexibilities it demands.  The work will be freelance, the budgets will vary, but I am looking for someone to join me on a long term basis. Current projects include commissions for FX, Netflix and the BBC. However I also work on very low budget stuff if I feel there is artistic merit, and I want to work with someone who has the same approach. 

Please apply with a CV and a short reel of original work that you have recorded / produced. I used to apply to these ads, I know it can be disheartening if there is no reply, so I will endeavour to respond to everyone. Thanks so much in advance, Sion

Write me a cover letter with my details and stuff above also with this as a base template. However, focus on Film and TV aspect:

I am reaching out to express my interest in the Music Composer or Music Composer Assistant internship position at Rev Room. I was intrigued by your commitment to nurturing emerging talent in the industry through a supportive internship programme that offers valuable hands-on experience in game audio development.


As an aspiring music composer with a strong passion for video game music, I am eager to contribute to the immersive gaming experiences that Rev Room creates. My diverse background in composing across multiple genres, coupled with my dedication to crafting auditory landscapes that enhance gameplay, aligns well with your company's vision.


In my previous endeavours, I have orchestrated dynamic soundtracks across a spectrum of game genres, ranging from open-world exploration to techno-racetrack adventures. Notably, I contributed music to a Sci-Fi investigation horror game, crafting atmospheric tension that seamlessly complemented pixel-art visuals, enhancing the immersive gaming experience. Collaborating with indie startup teams on boss battles and ambient music further sharpened my adaptability to diverse thematic requirements. Additionally, I am proficient in assisting with musician recordings, arrangements, and notations.


Proficient in Cubase and skilled in music composition, I am equipped to bring imaginative soundscapes to life while ensuring seamless audio-visual harmony in game environments. Furthermore, my academic background, including a Master of Arts in Composition of Music for Film and TV, has provided me with a deep understanding of music theory and storytelling, enhancing my ability to compose music that captivates and immerses players in the gaming experience.


I invite you to explore more of my work through the following platforms:

Website (Showreel on front page): https://tqfproduction.com/

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@tqf.production

Loopable Orchestral Game Music

LinkedIn


Thank you for considering my inquiry. I am excited about the opportunity to contribute my passion and expertise as a Music Composer to Rev Room. I look forward to the possibility of working together. I will also attach my CV to this email for reference.


Best wishes,

Martin To

Subject: Application for Music Composition and Sound Design Collaboration

Dear Sion,

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to express my profound interest in collaborating with you as a Music Composer, inspired by the vibrant and innovative projects you undertake, particularly in film and television. After coming across your call for a uniquely skilled and adaptable composer, I felt immediately drawn to the opportunity, confident that my background and aspirations align perfectly with your needs.

With a Master of Arts in Composition of Music for Film and TV, I have dedicated my career to refining my craft in music composition and sound design, tailoring auditory experiences that accentuate narrative and emotional depth across diverse visual media. My journey has been marked by an array of compositions for video games, where drawing players into immersive worlds through sound is paramount. Notably, my work on a Sci-Fi investigation horror game showcased my ability to weave atmospheric tension with pixel-art visuals to elevate the gaming experience. This, among other projects, has honed my versatility and creative approach to sound, qualities I am eager to transition and expand within the realms of film and television.

My proficiency extends beyond composition to recording, mixing, and self-producing to world-class/industry standards. Tools like Cubase are second nature to me, facilitating my creation of imaginative soundscapes that resonate with diverse audiences. Furthermore, my commitment to seamless collaboration and communication has been a key component of my professional ethos, ensuring projects not only meet but exceed expectations.

Though I am currently based outside the UK/Europe, I am meticulous in managing communications across time zones, ensuring responsiveness and alignment with project timelines. My portfolio, which I invite you to explore through my website and YouTube channel, showcases a breadth of original work across various genres and mediums:

- Website (Showreel on front page): [https://tqfproduction.com/](https://tqfproduction.com/)
- YouTube: [https://www.youtube.com/@tqf.production](https://www.youtube.com/@tqf.production)

I approach each project not only as an assignment but as an opportunity to contribute something uniquely compelling and emotive. I am enthusiastic about bringing this mindset to your diverse projects, from prestigious commissions for FX, Netflix, and the BBC, to passionate ventures in low-budget realms where artistic merit shines brightest.

Enclosed with this email is my CV, detailing my experiences, skills, and achievements in further depth, along with a short reel of my original work. I am eager for the opportunity to discuss how my background, skills, and enthusiasms align with your vision for future projects.

Thank you immensely for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of contributing to your remarkable projects, delivering not just music, but memorable auditory experiences that complement and elevate the narrative fabric of each production.

Warmest regards,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Check, improve and revise this

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to express my profound interest in collaborating with you as a Music Composer, inspired by the vibrant and innovative projects you undertake, particularly in film and television. After coming across your call for a uniquely skilled and adaptable composer, I felt immediately drawn to the opportunity, confident that my background and aspirations align perfectly with your needs.

Dear Sion,

I hope this message finds you in good spirits. I am reaching out to express my keen interest in collaborating with you as a Music Composer. Your commitment to vibrant and innovative projects, especially in film and television, caught my eye. Encountering your invitation for a uniquely skilled and adaptable composer resonated deeply with me, filling me with confidence that my background and aspirations are a perfect match for your requirements.

Holding a Master of Arts in Composition of Music for Film and TV, I have devoted my career to refining my art in music composition and sound design. My aim has always been to craft auditory experiences that enhance narrative and emotional resonance across a variety of visual media platforms. My portfolio spans compositions for animations, short films, documentaries, and video games, swinging the spotlight on immersive world-building through sound. A notable collaboration with a BBC documentary producer underscored my ability to mesh seamlessly into industry workflows, showcasing my knack for versatile and creatively nuanced soundscapes—a skill I am keen to extend into the film and television landscapes.

My expertise doesn't halt at composition; it extends to recording, mixing, and self-producing to meet and exceed world-class/industry standards. With tools like Cubase and Sibelius at my fingertips, I am adept at birthing imaginative soundscapes that captivate a varied audience spectrum. My proficiency in notation, arrangement, and orchestration primes me for efficient and impactful collaboration. Moreover, my unwavering commitment to smooth collaboration and transparent communication anchors my professional ethos, promising to lift each project from great to exceptional.

Currently based in Guildford, UK, I navigate time zones with precision, ensuring my responsiveness and project alignment remain uncompromised, even in my collaborations across East Asia. I invite you to delve into my body of work showcased on my website and YouTube channel, offering a wide lens on my original compositions across different genres and mediums:

- Website (Showreel on front page): https://tqfproduction.com/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@tqf.production

Viewing each project not just as an assignment but as an avenue to inject uniquely compelling and emotive narratives, I am thrilled at the prospect of contributing to your diverse endeavors. Whether it's prestige commissions for FX, Netflix, and the BBC or ventures into passionate, low-budget realms for their artistic merit, I am here for it all.

Enclosed with this email is my CV, providing a deeper insight into my experiences, skills, and achievements, complemented by a short reel of my original work. I am keen to discuss how my background, expertise, and passion can align with your vision for upcoming projects.

Thank you dearly for considering my application. I eagerly anticipate the opportunity to contribute to your remarkable slate of projects, delivering not just music, but unforgettable auditory experiences that enrich and elevate the narrative essence of each production.

Warmest regards,

Martin To
a bit shorter

Dear Sion,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing with enthusiastic interest in the musical collaboration opportunity you've presented, particularly attracted to your innovative projects in film and TV. Your search for a versatile, skilled composer resonates with me, and I am confident my background aligns with your vision.

With a Master of Arts in Composition of Music for Film and TV, my career has been dedicated to crafting auditory experiences that deepen narrative and emotional engagement across various media. My comprehensive portfolio includes work on animations, short films, documentaries, and video games, illustrating my capacity for immersive sound design. A notable project was my collaboration with a BBC documentary producer, highlighting my ability to integrate seamlessly into professional production workflows.

I bring expertise in recording, mixing, and self-producing to a world-class standard, proficient in Cubase and Sibelius for creating compelling soundscapes. My skills in notation, arrangement, and orchestration enable effective collaboration. Committed to clear communication and meeting project deadlines, I maintain exemplary standards, even when working across time zones – I am based in Guildford, UK but experienced in international collaborations.

Please find further insights into my work through my website and YouTube channel:

- Website (Showreel on front page): https://tqfproduction.com/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@tqf.production

I am eager to bring my creative approach to your projects, from high-profile commissions to artistic, low-budget ventures. Enclosed is my CV and a short reel of my original work. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can contribute to your future projects.

Thank you for considering my application. I am excited about the potential of adding memorable auditory experiences to your productions.

Warmest regards,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
give me a good title for this cover letter
Application for Music Composer Collaboration: Elevating Narratives Through Sound

Write a short sentense for this

I have just applied through MusicJobs website, thank you! Looking forward to our potential collaboration in the future! I am sure with my cultral and music toches on oriental would bring excitement with our collaborations! I really enjoy your composition of "When Ghosts Stir" and "True Colors".

I've submitted my application via the MusicJobs website—thank you for the opportunity! I eagerly anticipate the possibility of collaborating and am confident that my unique blend of cultural and musical touches, with an emphasis on the oriental, will add excitement to our projects. Also, I must say, your compositions "When Ghosts Stir" and "True Colors" truly resonated with me.

Here is the job description:

I need someone to add a minimal score that highlights the humor of the subject of my documentary while also conveying the ethereal setting of the California desert where it is set. The film is 6 minutes long, so hopefully it won't take too long.  

Use this cover letter I wrote before for another job as a reference and write me a new one to this job pitch

I am writing to express my keen interest in the Music Producer role for creating intro and outro music, as well as meditation tracks for Dysmocracy: The Fight over Fluoride podcast. With a comprehensive background in music composition and audio production across diverse genres, I believe I am uniquely equipped to meet and exceed your project’s requirements.

I have extensive experience composing various music genres, including styles similar to the reference track you provided, and I can create different variations based on the main theme for diverse usage. My portfolio reflects a wide range of styles, from dynamic orchestral pieces to pop and jazz, highlighting my versatile approach to music production. This versatility, combined with my meticulous attention to sound design and audio editing, ensures that the intro and outro music I produce will greatly enhance the listener’s experience by fostering relaxation and focus.

Furthermore, I am equipped to compose the original soundtrack for the entire documentary as needed. Drawing from my collaboration experience with BBC documentary producers, I am confident in my ability to bring visuals to life through music. Additionally, I am adept at handling other audio aspects of the film, such as mixing, mastering, and sound effects, providing comprehensive support to elevate the project's audio quality.

I invite you to review samples of my work,
Website (Show-reel on front page): https://tqfproduction.com/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@tqf.production
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tqf.production/
LinkedIn: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_URL>

I would appreciate the opportunity to schedule a virtual meeting to delve deeper into the specifics you envision for your project.

Thank you for considering my application. I am looking forward to potentially collaborating with you to create music that not only resonates with your audience but also elevates the overall listening experience.

Best wishes,

Subject: Application for Composer Role: Capturing Humor and Ethereal Beauty in Documentary Score

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am reaching out to express my sincere interest in contributing my musical expertise to your documentary set in the captivating landscapes of the California desert. Understanding that you seek a minimal score that both accentuates the humor of your subject and encapsulates the ethereal ambiance of the location, I am confident that my background in music composition and audio production makes me well-equipped to bring your visionary project to life.

With a rich history of composing across a broad spectrum of genres, I have honed my skills in crafting scores that speak to the soul of a film. My experience ranges from creating dynamic orchestral pieces to crafting subtle ambient tracks, all while keeping the narrative's emotional core in view. This versatility ensures that I can produce a score for your 6-minute documentary that not only underlines the humor intended but also beautifully portrays the serene yet vibrant essence of the California desert setting.

Having worked alongside documentary producers, including collaborations with the BBC, I bring a nuanced understanding of how music can significantly enhance visual storytelling. My approach integrates a deep sensitivity towards the thematic elements of a project, ensuring that every musical nuance complements and elevates the narrative. Whether it's weaving humor into the soundscape or capturing the sublime nature of your desert locale, my aim is to create a score that resonates with viewers on multiple levels.

Beyond composition, my skills extend to all facets of audio production, including mixing, mastering, and sound editing. This comprehensive capability allows me to offer complete end-to-end music production services, ensuring that the final audio track perfectly aligns with your documentary's visual and thematic objectives.

I warmly invite you to explore samples of my work, which showcase my versatility and dedication to crafting impactful musical narratives:

- Website (Showreel on the front page): https://tqfproduction.com/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@tqf.production
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tqf.production/
- LinkedIn: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_URL>

I eagerly look forward to the opportunity for a virtual meeting to discuss your project's specific needs and visions in greater detail.

Thank you for considering my application. I am excited about the prospect of collaborating with you to create a score that not only compliments your documentary's humor and setting but also profoundly connects with your audience.

Best Regards,

The job description has changed to this, write me a new cover letter again, with the same requirement mentioned above.

I am looking for a music creator to create an instrumental piece of music for a children's sensory video (this will need to be a piece of music that is child friendly and able to play repeatedly on a loop)

Subject: Application for Music Creator Role - Instrumental Piece for Children's Sensory Video

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am reaching out to express my enthusiasm for the opportunity to contribute to your children's sensory video project as a music creator. Understanding the unique requirements of creating an instrumental piece that is not only child-friendly but also captivating enough to be played on a loop, I am keen to lend my expertise to craft music that enriches this sensory experience for young audiences.

With a deep-rooted passion for music composition and a diverse background in audio production, I have cultivated a skill set that embraces the subtleties necessary for engaging a younger audience. My experience spans various musical styles, enabling me to create compositions that resonate with listeners of all ages. This versatility is crucial for developing a piece that is soothing, entertaining, and enriching for children, ensuring it supports the sensory video's aim to engage and stimulate young minds effectively.

One of my core strengths lies in creating atmospheric and ambient tracks that can seamlessly loop without losing their charm or becoming monotonous. This quality is particularly important for your project, where the music will play a pivotal role in maintaining a consistent and inviting environment for children to explore their senses. My approach involves closely understanding the video's themes and objectives, allowing me to compose music that complements and enhances the visual experience.

Furthermore, my comprehensive skills in audio production, including mixing and mastering, ensure that the final track will be of the highest quality, perfectly balanced, and ready for continuous play. My goal is to deliver a piece that is not only sonically appealing but also promotes a positive and calming sensory experience.

Please find examples of my work, showcasing my commitment to crafting engaging and meaningful musical compositions:

- Website (Showreel on the front page): https://tqfproduction.com/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@tqf.production
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tqf.production/
- LinkedIn: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_URL>

I am eager for the opportunity to discuss how my background, skills, and passion for music composition can contribute to the success of your children's sensory video project. I am enthusiastic about the possibility of creating an instrumental piece that will not only delight but also provide valuable sensory stimulation to young audiences.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the potential of working together to bring this project to life and create a lasting impact on its viewers.

Warmest regards,

Check 

Hotouville Port (Main Theme)

This is still one of my favourite orchestral work among all that I have composed. It is composed for a mobile game and it would be seamlessly loopable!

Your sentence is almost perfect! I've made a slight adjustment for clarity and flow:

"Hotouville Port (Main Theme) remains one of my favorite pieces of orchestral work among everything I have composed. It was created for a mobile game and is designed to loop seamlessly!"

Hotouville Port (Main Theme)

Hotouville Port (Main Theme) remains one of my favourite pieces of orchestral works among everything I have composed by far. It was created for a mobile game and is designed to loop seamlessly!

Your revision is clear and conveys your message effectively! Here's a minor tweak for grammatical accuracy and to slightly enhance the sentence structure:

"Hotouville Port (Main Theme) remains one of my favourite orchestral pieces among all that I have composed so far. It was specifically created for a mobile game and is designed to loop seamlessly!"

Check and improve theis email

I am a professional music composer and I love your art! I have used your art as my background in the past for my music and I have credit you. May I know I can use it as my track cover art in Spotify, please?

Youtube: https://youtu.be/2zKnZEbTJtQ
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/2OL3GN5hj5RYoi2glrOzzJ?si=HREcBd_cR7egej7AdWb3Ew
I would really love to use more of your arts for my tracks in the future as your styles really resonate with my music styles. And sometimes I compose based on your art like the above one. If you would like to, you can change the art a bit to Spotify requirement and maybe add your name and my name to the cover art too! We can do a long term collaboration, although I am new to the music industry, but in the future, I will surely commission you to draw something original for my track music cover when i have the budget.

Best wishes,
Martin

Subject: Request for Permission to Use Your Art as My Spotify Track Cover

Dear [Artist's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to express my deep admiration for your artwork; it truly captivates me. As a professional music composer, I find that your art perfectly complements the essence of my music. I have previously used your art as the backdrop for my music, always ensuring to give you proper credit for your incredible work.

I am reaching out to kindly inquire whether I might have your permission to use one of your pieces as my track cover art on Spotify. Here are links to my work for your reference:

- YouTube: https://youtu.be/2zKnZEbTJtQ
- Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/2OL3GN5hj5RYoi2glrOzzJ?si=HREcBd_cR7egej7AdWb3Ew

Your artistic style profoundly resonates with my music, and it inspires me profoundly. In fact, some of my compositions, like the one linked above, are directly influenced by your art. I envision a beautiful synergy between our creative expressions, where your art continues to inspire my music.

Looking ahead, I am very keen on forming a long-term collaboration with you. While I am currently navigating the early stages of my career in the music industry, I am optimistic about commissioning original pieces from you for my future projects, once my budget permits.

If you're open to this idea, perhaps there could be an opportunity for you to tailor the artwork slightly to meet Spotify's requirements. Additionally, incorporating both our names into the cover art could further celebrate our collaborative effort.

I eagerly await your thoughts and sincerely hope for the possibility of working together, melding our artistic endeavors into something truly unique and resonant.

Thank you very much for considering my request. I look forward to potentially hearing from you.

Best wishes,
Martin
